english translation text: Dua'a Jawshan Al Kabir

In the Name of Allah,
the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
1 TO OVERCOME DIFFICULTIES

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَ يَا اللَّهُ
english translation text: O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name: O Allah,
O Most Merciful, O Most Compassionate,
O Most Generous, O Self-Subsisting,
O Greatest, O Eternal,

arabic text: يَا عَلِيمُ يَا حَلِيمُ يَا حَكِيمُ
english translation text: O All-Knowing, O Forbearing, O Wise.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
2  TO SEEK HELP
O Master of Masters,
O Acceptor of prayers,
O Elevator of rank,
O Guardian of good deeds,
O Forgiver of evil deeds,
O Granter of requests,
O Acceptor of repentance,
O Hearer of voices,
O Knower of attributes,
O Repeller of calamities.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
3 TO ATTAIN HONOR, DIGNITY
O Best of forgivers,
O Best of deciders,
O Best of helpers,
O Best of rulers,
O Best of providers,
O Best of inheritors
O Best of praisers,
O Best of rememberers,
O Best of dischargers,
O Best of benefactors.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
4 TO ACQUIRE NOBILITY
O He, to Whom is all glory and virtue,
O He, to Whom is all might and perfection,
O He, to Whom is all dominion and sublimity,
O He, Who is great above all,
O He, Who creates heavy clouds,
O He, Who is the most powerful,
O He, Who is quick to reckon,
O He, Who metes out the severest punishment,
O He, with Whom is the excellent reward,
O He, with Whom is the Original Book.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
5 TO ACHIEVE RENOWN, SUCCESS
O Allah, Verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Charitable One, O Benefactor,
O Judge, O Proof,
O Sovereign, O Approver,

arabic text: يَا غُفْرَانُ يَا سُبْحَانُ يَا مُسْتَعَانُ
english translation text: O Forgiver, O Elevated One, O Helper,
O Holder of blessings and manifestation.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
6 TO OBTAIN BLESSINGS, RANKS

arabic text: يَا مَن تَوَاضَعَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِّعَظَمَتِهِ
english translation text: O He before Whose greatness everything bows,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ اسْتَسلَمَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِّقُدْرَتِهِ
english translation text: O He before Whose power everything submits,

arabic text: يَا مَن ذَلَّ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِّعِزَّتِهِ
english translation text: O He before Whose might overshadows everything,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ خَضَعَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِّهَيْبَتِهِ
english translation text: O He before Whose awesomeness everything is humbled,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ انْقَادَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ مِّنْ خَشْيَتِهِ
english translation text: O He before Whose fearsomeness everything yields,

arabic text: يَا مَن تَشَقَّقَتِ الْجِبَالُ مِن مَّخَافَتِهِ
english translation text: O He before Whose terribleness mountains shake,
O He before Whose command the heavens are raised,
O He through Whose permission in the earths are secured,
O He Whose glory the thunder proclaims,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يَعْتَدِي عَلَى أَهْلِ مَمْلَكَتِهِ
english translation text: O He Who is never cruel to His subjects.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
7 TO DISPERSE CALAMITIES
O Forgiver of sins,
O Dispeller of tribulations,
O Aim of hopes,
O Giver of abundant gifts,
O Bestower of bounties,
O Provider of creatures,
O Judge of destinies,
O Hearer of complaints,
O Resurrector of creatures,
O Freer of captives.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
8 TO ASK PARDON
O He, to Whom is due all praise and adoration,
O He, Who holds all pride and eminence,
O He, Who holds all honour and rank,
O He, Who makes promises and honours them,
O He, Who pardons and is content,
O He, Who holds all abundance and provides,
O He, Who holds decision and judgement,
O He, Who is glorious and eternal,
O He, Who is liberal and munificent,
O He, Who holds all blessings and bounties.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
9 TO CLEAR AWAY FEAR & DISEASE
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Preventer of misfortune, O Repeller of calamities.
O Elevator of rank, O Fashioner,
O Benefiter O Hearer,
O Aggregator, O Intercessor,
O Magnanimous, O Increaser.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
10 TO GET CONDUCT APPROVED
O Fashioner of every fashioned thing,
O Creator of every created thing,
O Provider for every needy thing,
O Sovereign over all subjects,
O Dispeller of every hardship,
O Comforter of every griever,
O Merciful to every sufferer,
O Helper of everything forsaken,
O Concealer of every blemished thing,
O Shelter for every exile.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
11 TO AVOID EVIL & GAIN PROSPERITY
O Provider in my hardship,
O Source of Hope in my misfortune,
O Companion in my isolation,
O Fellow Traveller in my journey,
O Friend in my ease,
O Rescuer from my trials,
O Guide in my perplexity,
O Resource in my neediness,
O Shelter in my helplessness,
O Deliverer from my fears.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
12 TO DISMISS AFFLICTION & SECURE GOOD FORTUNE
O Knower of the unseen,
O Forgiver of sins,
O Concealer of defects,
O Expeller of pain,
O Transformer of the hearts
O Physician of the hearts,
O Illuminator of the hearts,
O Intimate of the hearts,
O Dispeller of anxiety,
O Liberator from grief.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
13 TO CURE EYE DISEASE
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Glorious, O Virtuous,
O Protector, O Patron,
O Guide, O Guarantor,
O Bestower of Wealth, O Bestower of blessings,
O Bestower of strength, O Acceptor of repentance.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
14 TO INCREASE HEALTH
O Guide of the waylaid,
O Rescuer of those who appeal,
O Helper of those who call,
O Aider of those who call,
O Shelter of the fearful,
O Succourer of the faithful,
O Merciful to the indigent,
O Refuge for the disobedient,
O Forgiver of the sinner,
O Responder to the supplicant

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
15 TO ASK FOR MORE BENEFITS
O Master of liberality and beneficence,
O Most gracious and obliging,
O Master of peace and security,
O Most holy and above all defects,
O Master of wisdom and manifestation,
O Master of mercy and satisfaction,
O Master of argument and proof,
O Master of grandeur and sovereignty,
O Master of kindness and succour,
O Master of pardon and forgiveness.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
16 TO SOLVE PROBLEMS

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ رَبُّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: O He, Who is the Lord over all things,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ إِلَهُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: O He, Who is the Allah of all things,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ خَاِلقُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: O He, Who is the Creator of all things,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ صَانِعُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: O He, Who is the Fashioner of all things,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ قَبْلَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: O He, Who is the Preceder of all things,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بَعْدَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: O He, Who is the Successor of all things,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فَوْقَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: O He, Who is above all things,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَاِلمٌ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: O He, Who knows all things,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ قَادِرٌ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: O He, Who is Powerful over all things,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ يَبْقَى وَيَفْنَى كُلُّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: O He, Who is the Sustainer and Extinguisher of all things,

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
17 TO SUCCEED IN ALL TASKS
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Securer of safety, O Protector,
O Bestower of being, O Bestower of knowledge,
O Manifester, O Facilitator,
O Provider of place, O Adorner,
O Proclaimer, O Distributor.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
18 TO INCREASE LIVELIHOOD

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي مُلْكِهِ مُقِيمٌ
english translation text: O Everlasting in His Kingdom,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي سُلْطَانِهِ قَدِيمٌ
english translation text: O Eternal in His sovereignty,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي جَلاَلِهِ عَظِيمٌ
english translation text: O Greatest in His grandeur,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَلَى عِبَادِهِ رَحِيمٌ
english translation text: O Most Merciful to His servants,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عَلِيمٌ
english translation text: O Knower of everything,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ عَصَاهُ حَلِيمٌ
english translation text: O Forbearing to him who disobeys Him,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَن رَّجَاهُ كَرِيمٌ
english translation text: O Magnanimous to him who places his hope in Him,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي صُنْعِهِ حَكِيمٌ
english translation text: O He Who is Wise over what He has fashioned,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي حِكْمَتِهِ لَطِيفٌ
english translation text: O He Who is Subtle in His Wisdom,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي لُطْفِهِ قَدِيمٌ
english translation text: O He Who is Eternal in His Kindness.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
19 TO ATTAIN DISTINCTION

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُرْجَى إِلاَّ فَضْلُهُ
english translation text: O He, from Whom no hope is entertained save by His Grace,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُسْأَلُ إِلاَّ عَفْوُهُ
english translation text: O He, from Whom nothing is begged save His Pardon,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُنْظَرُ إِلاَّ بِرُّهُ
english translation text: O He, of Whom nothing is seen save His Goodness,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُخَافُ إِلاَّ عَدْلُهُ
english translation text: O He, from Whom nothing is feared save His Justice,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يَدُومُ إِلاَّ مُلْكُهُ
english translation text: O He, Whose sovereignty alone of eternal,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا سُلْطَانَ إِلاَّ سُلْطَانُهُ
english translation text: O He, Who alone has true majesty,

arabic text: يَا مَن وَّسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ رَّحْمَتُهُ
english translation text: O He, Whose blessings extend to all,
O He, Whose Wrath is surpassed by His Mercy,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عِلْمُهُ
english translation text: O He, Whose knowledge encompasses everything,
O He, Who is without equal,

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
20 TO DISPERSE WORRIES
O Remover of anxiety,
O Expeller of sorrow,
O Forgiver of sins,
O Acceptor of repentance,
O Creator of creatures,
O Truthful in promises,
O Fulfiller of promises,
O Knower of secrets,
O Splitter of seed,
O Provider for creatures.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
21 TO ASK FOR PARDON
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O High, O Perfect
O Independent, O Rich,
O Kind, O Agreeable
O Purifier, O Eternal,
O Mighty, O Friend.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
22 TO INCREASE LIVELIHOOD
O He, Who reveals virtue,
O He, Who conceals vice,
O He Who does not call to severe account for sins,
O He, Who does not disclose the disgrace of His servants,
O He, Who is the best forgiver,
O He, Who overlooks errancy,
O He, Whose forgiveness extends over all.
O He, Whose Hands are stretched forth in mercy,
O He, Who knows all secrets,
O He, to Whom all complaints are directed.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
23 TO GET MORE BENEFICIENCE
O Master of countless blessings,
O Master of limitless mercy,
O Master surpassing all obligation,

O Most vigilant of invigilators,
O Best of intercessors,

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ

arabic text: يَا عِمَادَ مَن لا عِمَادَ لَهُ

arabic text: يَا فَخْرَ مَن لا فَخْرَ لَهُ

arabic text: يَا عِزَّ مَن لا عِزَّ لَهُ

arabic text: يَا مُعِينَ مَن لا مُعِينَ لَهُ

arabic text: يَا أَنِيسَ مَن لا أَنِيسَ لَهُ

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:

O Present, O Praiser,
O Exalted, O Guide,
O Resurrector, O Heir,
O Harmful to the unjust,
O Beneficial to the just.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:

O Most Ancient of all the ancient,
O Most Great of all the great,
O Most Benign of all the benign,
O Most Magnificent of all the magnificent,
O Most Mighty of all the mighty.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:

O Eternal in grace,
O Eternal in subtlety,
O Creator of subtlety,
O Remover of pain,
O Healer of injury,

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي قُوَّتِهِ عَلِيٌّ

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي لُطْفِهِ شَرِيفٌ

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي شَرَفِهِ عَزِيزٌ

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عِزِّهِ عَظِيمٌ
english translation text: O He Who is great in His power,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَظَمَتِهِ مَجِيدٌ

O Judge, O Agreeable,
O High, O Eternal

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:

english translation text: O He to Whom everything owes its existence,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا مَفَرَّ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ
english translation text: O He - there is no retreat but towards Him,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا مَفْزَعَ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ
english translation text: O He - there is no place of protection except with Him,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا مَقْصَدَ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ
english translation text: O He—there is no right path except that which leads to Him,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا مَنجَىً مِنْهُ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ
english translation text: O He - there is no shelter against Him but with Him,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُرْغَبُ إِلاَّ إلَيهِ
english translation text: O He - there is no inclination towards anyone except Him,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا حَوْلَ وَلا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِهِ
english translation text: O He - there is no strength and vigour but from Him,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُسْتَعَانُ إِلاَّ بِهِ
english translation text: O He - none is invoked for help but He.

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُتَوَكَّلُ إِلاَّ عَلَيْهِ
english translation text: O He - trust is not reposed in anyone but He,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُرْجَى إِلاَّ هُوَ
english translation text: O He - hope is not entertained from anyone except from He,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُعْبَدُ إِلاَّ هُوَ
english translation text: O He - none is worshipped except He

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ

arabic text: يَا ذَاكِرُ يَا نَاظِرُ يَا نَاصِرُ
english translation text: O Rememberer, O Seeing, O Helper.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
41 TO DISPERESE POISONOUS WINDS
O He Who created and perfected,
O He Who made everything to measure and guided,
O He Who removes misfortunes,
O He Who overhears secrets,
O He Who rescues the drowning,
O He Who saves the distressed,
O He Who restores the sick to health,
O He who makes [His slaves] laugh and weep,
O He Who causes to dies and calls to life,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الزَّوْجَيْنِ الذَّكَرَ وَالأُنْثَى
english translation text: O He Who has created pairs of male and female.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
42 TO AVOID CALAMITIES

arabic text: يَا مَن فِي الْبَرِّ وَالْبَحْرِ سَبِيلُهُ
english translation text: O He Whose course is on land and in water,
O He Whose signs are in the universe,
O He in Whose signs are undeniable proofs,
O He Whose might is exhibited in causing death,
O He Whose lesson is in graves,
O He Whose kingdom will be on the Day of Judgement,
O He in Whose reckoning of deeds is His dread,
O He in Whose balance is His order,
O He Whose paradise is the place of His good reward,
O He Whose hell is the place of chastisement.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
43 TO AVOID CALAMITIES
O He - the frightened flee to Him,
O He - sinners take shelter with Him,
O He - the repentant return to Him,
O He - the pious incline towards Him,
O He - the confounded seek shelter in Him,
O He - the desirous have affliction for Him,
O He - lovers are proud of Him,

arabic text: يَا مَن فِي عَفْوِهِ يَطْمَعُ الْخَاطِئُونَ

O He - those who are sure in faith receive consolation from Him,
O He - those who trust Him rely on Him.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord

O Friend, O physician,
O Near, O Supervisor,
O Reckoner to account, O Awful,
O Rewarder, O Acceptor,
O Aware, O All-Seeing.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:

O Noblest of all the nobles,
O Most Exalted of all the exalted,

O Most Independent of all,
O Most Generous of all,
O Kindest of all those who are kind

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
46 TO CURE INFANTILE PARALYSIS
O Dominant who is not overpowered,
O Designer who is not made.
O Creator who is not created,
O Master and not the slave,
O All-Dominant who is not dominated,
O Exalter and the Exalted,
O Protector who needs no protection,
O Helper who needs no help,
O Witness who is not absent,
O Near who is not distant.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
47 TO CURE EPILEPSY
O Light of lights,
O Illuminator of light,
O Creator of light
O Planner of light,
O Estimator of light,
O Light of all lights,
O Light that precedes in existence every light,
O Light that will survive all lights,
O Light that is above every light,
O Light like of which there is no light.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
48 TO GET RID OF CONSTIPATION
O He Whose gift is noble,
O He Whose action is subtle,
O He Whose kindness is persistent,
O He Whose beneficence is eternal,
O He Whose word is right,
O He Whose promise is true,
O He Whose forgiveness is a grace,
O He Whose chastisement is justice,
O He Whose remembrance is sweet,
O He Whose grace is universal.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord

O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Facilitator, O Separator,
O Alterer, O Humiliating of the proud,
O Degrader, O Benefactor,
O Munificent, O Giver of respite,
O Grantor of respite, O Virtuous,

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
50 TO IMPROVE EYE SIGHT
O He Who sees but is not seen,
O He Who creates and is not created,
O He Who guides and is not guided,
O He Who receives to life and is not brought to life,
O He Who questions and is not questioned,
O He Who feeds and does not eat,

arabic text: يَا مَن يُّجِيرُ وَلا يُجَارُ عَلَيْهِ
english translation text: O He Who gives protection and is in no need of protection,

arabic text: يَا مَن يَّقْضِي وَلا يُقْضَى عَلَيْهِ
english translation text: O He Who judges and against Whom no judgement is passed,

arabic text: يَا مَن يَّحْكُمُ وَلا يُحْكَمُ عَلَيْهِ
english translation text: O He Who commands but is not commanded:

arabic text: يَا مَن لَّمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
english translation text: O He Who begets not, nor is He begotten,
And there is none like unto Him.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:

51 TO DISPEL MISCHIEF OF ENEMY
O Best reckoner,
O Best physician,
O Best guardian,
O Best near one,
O Best responder,
O Best friend,
O Best surety,
O Best protector,
O Best master,
O Best helper.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:

52 TO GET RID OF POVERTY
O Joy of saints,
O Desire of friends.
O Friend of seekers,
O Friend of penitents,
O Provider of sustenance to the poor,
O Hope of sinners,
O Coolness of worshippers' eyes,
O Remover of sufferers' pain,
O Dispeller of the sorrows of the sorrowful,
O Allah of the first and the last generation.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:

53 TO CULTIVATE LOVE
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O our Lord, O our Allah,
O our Chief, O our Master,
O our Helper, O our Protector,
O our Guide, O our Aider,
O our Friend, O our Physician.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
54 TO CURE TOOTHACHE
O Lord of the prophets and the virtuous,
O Lord of the righteous and chosen one,
O Lord of paradise and hell,
O Lord of the small and the great,
O Lord of grains and fruits,
O Lord of canals and trees,
O Lord of forest and desert,
O Lord of lands and seas,
O Lord of night and day,
O Lord of the manifest and the hidden.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
55 TO CURE PAIN IN RIBS

arabic text: يَا مَن نَّفَذَ فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ أَمْرُهُ
english translation text: O He, Whose command operates in everything,

arabic text: يَا مَن لَّحِقَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عِلْمُهُ
english translation text: O He, Whose knowledge encompasses everything,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ بَلَغَتْ إِلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قُدْرَتُهُ
english translation text: O He, Whose control extends to everything,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُحْصِي الْعِبَادُ نِعَمَهُ
english translation text: O He, Whose bounties cannot be counted by His slaves,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا تَبْلُغُ الْخَلائِقُ شُكْرَهُ
english translation text: O He, Whom His creatures cannot adequately thank,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا تُدْرِكُ الأَفْهَامُ جَلاَلَهُ
english translation text: O He, Whose grandeur cannot be comprehended by the intellect,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا تَنَالُ الأَوْهَامُ كُنْهَهُ
english translation text: O He, Whose reality cannot be acquired by the imagination,
O He, Whose garb is majesty and greatness,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يَرُدُّ الْعِبَادُ قَضَاءَهُ
english translation text: O He, Whose judgement cannot be reversed by His slave,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا مُلْكَ إِلا مُلْكُهُ
english translation text: O He, Whose alone is the kingdom and no one else'

arabic text: يَا مَن لا عَطَاءَ إِلا عَطَاؤُهُ
english translation text: O He, Whose alone is the gift and none else's,

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
56 TO CURE DISEASES
O He, for Whom are noblest examples,
O He, for Whom are high attributes,
O He, Who is the Master of the beginning and the end,
O He, Who is the Master of the abode of paradise,
O He, for Whom are great signs,
O He, for Whom are beautiful names,
O He, for Whom is order and judgement,
O He, Who rules over the atmosphere and the expanse,
O He, Whose is the Lordship of the highest heaven and the earth,
O He, Who is the Master of the high heavens.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:

O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Pardoner, O Forgiver,
O Patient, O Greatest appreciator (of good),
O Kind, O Sympathetic,
O Besought, O Friend,
O Most Glorified, O Most Holy.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
58 TO GET HONOUR AND RESPECT
O He, Whose greatness is in the heavens,
O He, Whose signs are on the earth,

arabic text: يَا مَن فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ دَلائِلُهُ
english translation text: O He, Whose proofs are manifest in everything,
O He, Whose wonders are in the seas,
O He, Whose treasures are in the mountains,

arabic text: يَا مَن يَّبْدَأُ الْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُ
english translation text: O He, Who originated Creation which then returns to Him,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ إِلَيْهِ يَرْجِعُ الأَمْرُ كُلُّهُ
english translation text: O He, towards Whom is the return of every matter,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ أَظْهَرَ فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ لُّطْفَهُ
english translation text: O, Whose Kindness is evident in everything,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ أَحْسَنَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ خَلَقَهُ
english translation text: O He, Who makes best everything which He has created,

arabic text: يَا مَن تَصَرَّفَ فِي الْخَلائِقِ قُدْرَتُهُ
english translation text: O He, Whose authority is wielded over all creatures.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
59 TO CURE STOMACH-ACHE

arabic text: يَا حَبِيبَ مَن لا حَبِيبَ لَهُ
english translation text: O Friend of he who has no friend,

arabic text: يَا طَبِيبَ مَن لا طَبِيبَ لَهُ
english translation text: O Physician of he who has no physician,

arabic text: يَا مُجِيبَ مَن لا مُجِيبَ لَهُ
english translation text: O Responder to he who has no responder,

arabic text: يَا شَفِيقَ مَن لا شَفِيقَ لَهُ
english translation text: O Affectionate One to he whom none hold in affection,

arabic text: يَا رَفِيقَ مَن لا رَفِيقَ لَهُ
english translation text: O Friend of he who has no friend,

arabic text: يَا مُغِيثَ مَن لا مُغِيثَ لَهُ
english translation text: O Helper of he who has no help,

arabic text: يَا دَلِيلَ مَن لا دَلِيلَ لَهُ
english translation text: O Guide of he who has no guide,

arabic text: يَا أَنِيسَ مَن لا أَنِيسَ لَهُ
english translation text: O Associate of the forlorn,

arabic text: يَا رَاحِمَ مَن لا رَاحِمَ لَهُ
english translation text: O Merciful One towards he on whom no one has mercy,

arabic text: يَا صَاحِبَ مَن لا صَاحِبَ لَهُ
english translation text: O Companion of he who has no companion.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
60 TO SUCEED IN VITAL JOBS
O Sufficer for those who seek sufficiency,
O Guide for those who seek guidance,
O Protector for those who seek protection,
O Granter for concession to those who seek concession,
O Healer for those who seek cure,
O Just One for those who seek justice,
O Bestower of wealth for those who seek wealth,
O Fulfiller of promises for those who seek fulfillment,
O Granter of strength for those who seek strength,
O Aider of those who seek aid.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
61 TO SEEK TRANQUILITY
O Allah , verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Creator, O Provider of sustenance,
O Creator of speech, O Truthful,
O Splitter, O Separator,
O Breaker, O Combiner,
O Foremost, O Most High.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
62 TO WIN FRIENDSHIP OF THE RICH
O He, Who changes night and day,
O He, Who has created darkness and light,
O He, Who has bestowed shade and heat,
O He, Who has brought into subjection the sun and the moon,
O He, Who has ordained virtue and vice,
O He, Who has created death and life,
O He, Who has made the body and the soul,

arabic text: يَا مَن لَّمْ يَتِّخِذْ صَاحِبَةً وَّلا وَلَداً
english translation text: O He, Who has neither taken a wife nor begotten any child,

arabic text: يَّا مَن لَّيْسَ لَهُ شَرِيكٌ فِي الْمُلْكِ
english translation text: O He, Who has no partner in His sovereignty,

arabic text: يَا مَن لَّمْ يَكُن لَّهُ وَلِيٌّ مِّنَ الذُّلِّ
english translation text: O He, Who has no friend among the disgraced.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
63 TO MAKE PROFIT IN BUSINESS
O He, Who knows the desire of the desirous,
O He, Who knows the conscience of the silent,
O He, who hears the cries of the weak,
O He, Who sees the lamentation of the frightened,
O He, Who satisfies the needs of the petitioner,
O He, Who accepts the excuse of the repentant,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُصْلِحُ عَمَلَ الْمُفْسِدِينَ
english translation text: O He, Who does not correct the actions of the mischievous,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُضِيعُ أَجْرَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ
english translation text: O He, Who does not waste the good reward of the virtuous,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يَبْعُدُ عَن قُلُوبِ الْعَارِفِينَ
english translation text: O He, Who is not absent from the mind of the saint,
O the most Magnanimous of all those who show magnanimity.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
64 TO CURE HEADACHE
O Eternal Living,
O Hearer of prayers,
O Liberal Bestower
O Forgiver of sins,
O Creator of the sky,
O Best tester of trials,
O Most Praiseworthy,
O Eternally Great,
O Greatest fulfiller of promises,
O Best Recompenser.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
65 TO SEEK FORGIVENESS
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O Best concealer of defects, O Best forgiver,
O Most dominant, O Supreme,
O Most patient, O Most virtuous,
O Most exalted, O Best opener,
O Blower of winds, O Bestower of Happiness.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
66 TO GET RID OF POVERTY
O He, Who created me and perfected me,
O He, Who provided me with sustenance and nurtured me,
O He, Who provided food for me and quenched my thirst,
O He, Who brought me near Him and brought me most nigh,
O He, Who protected me and kept me in safety,
O He, Who saved and guarded me,
O He, Who honoured me and enriched me,
O He, Who helped and guided me,
O He, Who befriended me and sheltered me,
O He, Who causes me to die and revivifies me.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
67 TO CURE EYE AILMENTS
O He, Who maintains truth by His words,

arabic text: يَا مَن يَّقْبَلُ التَّوْبَةَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِ
english translation text: O He, Who accepts repentance from His slaves,

arabic text: يَا مَن يَّحُولُ بَيْنَ الْمَرْءِ وَقَلْبِهِ
english translation text: O He, Who stands between man and his heart,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا تَنْفَعُ الشَّفَاعَةُ إِلا بِإِذْنِهِ
english translation text: O He, without Whose permission intercession has no benefit,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَنْ سَبِيلِهِ
english translation text: O He, Who knows well who is astray from His path,
O He, Whose order no one can reverse,
O He, Whose judgement no one can revoke,

arabic text: يَا مَنِ انْقَادَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لأَمْرِهِ

O He, in Whose Right Hand the heavens shall be rolled up,

arabic text: يَا مَن يُّرْسِلُ الرِّيَاحَ بُشْريً بَيْنَ يَدَيْ رَحْمَتِهِ
english translation text: O He, Who has made earth a cradle,

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
68 TO WARD OFF PLAGUE
O He, Who sends forth the winds bearing good tiding before His mercy.
O He, Who has made the mountains pegs,
O He, Who has made the sun a lamp,
O He, Who has made the moon a light,
O He, Who has made the night a covering,
O He, Who has made the day for seeking livelihood,
O He, Who has made sleep a rest,
O He, Who has made the sky a vault,
O He, Who has created things in pairs,
O He, Who has made hell an ambush, barking for sinners.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
69 TO ACHIEVE EMINENCE
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:
O All-hearer, O Mediator,
O Sublime, O Invincible,
O Swift, O Originator,
O Great, O Omnipotent,
O Knowing, O Supporter.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
70 TO GET LONG LIFE
O Everliving, preceding every living being,
O Everliving, succeeding every living being,

arabic text: يَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ حَيٌّ
english translation text: O Everliving, like unto Whom there is none,

arabic text: يَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي لا يُشَارِكُهُ حَيٌّ
english translation text: O Everliving, Who has no living partner,

arabic text: يَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي لا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى حَيٍّ
english translation text: O Everliving, Who is not dependent on any living being,

arabic text: يَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي يُمِيتُ كُلَّ حَيٍّ
english translation text: O Everliving, Who causes every living being to die,

arabic text: يَّا حَيُّ الَّذِي يَرْزُقُ كُلَّ حَيٍّ
english translation text: O Everliving, Who provides sustenance to every living being,

arabic text: يَّا حَيّاً لَّمْ يَرِثِ الْحَيَاةَ مِنْ حَيٍّ
english translation text: O Everliving, Who has not inherited life from any living being,
O Everliving, Who quickens the dead,

arabic text: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ، لا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةً وَّلا نَوْمٌ
english translation text: O Everliving, O Self-Subsistent, Slumber seizeth Him not, nor sleep.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
71 TO PREVENT CYCLONE

arabic text: يَا مَن لَّهُ ذِكْرٌ لا يُنْسَى
english translation text: O He, Whose remembrance is not forgotten,

arabic text: يَا مَن لَّهُ نُورٌ لا يُطْفَى
english translation text: O He, Whose light is not extinguished

arabic text: يَا مَن لَّهُ نِعْمٌ لا تُعَدُّ
english translation text: O He, Whose bounties are countless,

arabic text: يَّا مَن لَّهُ مُلْكٌ لا يَزُولُ
english translation text: O He, Whose grandeur is perpetual,

arabic text: يَا مَن لَّهُ ثَنَاءٌ لا يُحْصَى
english translation text: O He, Whose praise does not admit of alteration,

arabic text: يَا مَن لَّهُ جَلاَلٌ لا يُكَيَّفُ
english translation text: O He, Whose glory is not framed,

arabic text: يَا مَن لَّهُ كَمَالٌ لا يُدْرَكُ
english translation text: O He, Whose perfection cannot be comprehended,

arabic text: يَا مَن لَّهُ قَضَاءٌ لا يُرَدُّ
english translation text: O He, Whose order is not rejected,

arabic text: يَا مَن لَّهُ صِفَاتٌ لا تُبَدَّلُ،
english translation text: O He, Whose attributes do not change,

arabic text: يَا مَن لَّهُ نُعُوتٌ لا تُغَيَّرُ
english translation text: O He, Whose attributes do not alter,

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
72 TO CURE PAIN IN BREASTS
O Lord of all the worlds,
O Master of the Day of Judgement,
O Ultimate Goal of the seeker,
O Refuge of the seeker of shelter,
O Overtaker of the fugitive,
O He Who loves the patient,
O He, Who loves the repentant,
O He, Who loves the pure,
O He, Who loves the virtuous
O He, Who knows best the guided,

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
73 TO CURE RHEUMATISM
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Affectionate, O Companion,
O Protector, O Encompasser,
O Provider of sustenance, O Aider of seekers of aid,
O Honourer, O Humiliating,
O Creator, O He Who causes to return.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
74 TO HAVE A SON

arabic text: يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَحَدٌ بِلاَ ضِدٍّ
english translation text: O He, Who is single and without opposite,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فَرْدٌ بِلاَ نِدٍّ
english translation text: O He, Who is Unique, O He, Who is Peerless,
O He, Who is Independent and without any defect,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ وِتْرٌ بِلاَ كَيْفٍ
english translation text: O He, Who is without changing state,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ قَاضٍ بِلاَ حَيْفٍ
english translation text: O He, Who judges without injustice,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ رَبٌّ بِلاَ وَزِيرٍ
english translation text: O He, Who is the Lord Cherisher,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَزِيزٌ بِلاَ ذُلٍّ
english translation text: O He, Who is Mighty without disgrace,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ غَنِيٌّ بِلاَ فَقْرٍ
english translation text: O He, Who is Independent without any need,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ مَلِكٌ بِلاَ عَزْلٍ
english translation text: O He, Who is the King without any censure,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ مَوْصُوفٌ بِلاَ شَبِيهٍ
english translation text: O He, Whose attributes are matchless.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:

75 TO GET HIGH POSITION
O He, Whose remembrance is an honour for those who remember Him,
O He, Whose gratitude is success for the grateful,
O He, Whose praise is the pride of the praiser,
O He, the obedience to Whom is salvation for the obedient
O He, Whose door is open to the seeker,
O He, the path leading to Whom is clear for the repentant,
O He, Whose signs are proofs for the observers,
O He, Whose Book is advice to the pious,

arabic text: يَا مَن رِّزْقُهُ عُمُومٌ لِّلطَّائِعِينَ وَالْعَاصِينَ
english translation text: O He, Whose provision, is love the obedient and disobedient alike,

arabic text: يَا مْن رَّحْمَتُهُ قَرِيبٌ مِّنَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ
english translation text: O He, Whose mercy is close to the virtuous.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:

O He, Whose name is glorious,
O He, Whose honour is exalted,
O He - there is no deity except Him,
O He - great is His praise,
O He, Whose names are sacred,
O He, Whose existence is eternal,
O He, Whose glory is His ornament,
O He, Whose greatness is His covering,
O He, Whose favours are countless,
O He, Whose bounties cannot be enumerated.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord

O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Helper, O Trustworthy,
O Manifest, O Powerful,
O Firm, O True Guide,
O Praiseworthy, O Glorious,
O Strong, O Witness

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord

O Lord of the Glorious Throne,
O He, Whose words are right.
O Master of great deeds,
O He, Whose punishment is severe
O Master of promise and threat,
O He, Who is guardian and the most praised one,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فْعَّالٌ لِّمَا يُرِيدُ
english translation text: O He, Who is the mighty doer of whatever He wills,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ هُوَ قْرِيبٌ غَيْرُ بَعِيدٍ
english translation text: O He, Who is near and not far,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ شَهِيدٌ
english translation text: O He, Who is Witness to everything,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ هُوَ لَيْسَ بِظَلاَّمٍ لِّلْعَبِيدِ
english translation text: O He, Who is not the least cruel to His slaves,

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
79 TO SEEK FREEDOM

arabic text: يَا مَن لا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَلاوَزَيرَ
english translation text: O He, Who has no partner and no adviser,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا شَبِيهَ لَهُ وَلا نَظِيرَ
english translation text: O He, Who has no equal and no match,
O Creator of the sun and the bright moon,
O Enricher of the poverty stricken,
O Provider of sustenance to small children,
O Merciful to the very aged ones,
O Joiner of broken bones,
O Protector of the frightened shelter seekers,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِعِبَادِهِ خَبَيِرٌ بَصِيرٌ
english translation text: O He , Who is All-Aware and All-Seeing of His slaves,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
english translation text: O He, Who is Powerful over everything.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
80 TO SEEK PROSPERITY
O Master of generosity and the Bestower of the bounties,
O Gracious and Magnanimous,
O Creator of the Tablet and the Pen,
O Creator of ants and men,
O Inflictor of punishment and Retaliator,
O Inspirer of Arabs and non-Arabs,
O Expeller of pain and grief,
O He, Who knows the secrets and the mysteries,
O Lord of the Kaaba and the Sacred Precinct,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الأَشْيَاءَ مِنَ الْعَدَمِ
english translation text: O He, Who has created everything out of nothingness,

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
81 TO CURE MIGRANE
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Doer, O Creator
O Acceptor, O Perfect,
O Gracious, O Separator
O Just, O Dominant,
O Seeker, O Generous

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
82 TO CURE ULCER
O He, Who graciously bestows His bounties on us,
O He, Who honours us with His charity,
O He, Who rewards us out of His beneficing,
O He, Who makes us respectable with His might,
O He, Who predestines with His wisdom,
O He, Who judges with His planning,
O He, Who decrees with His knowledge,
O He, Who is forbearing with His forbearance,
O He, Who is near us in spite of His exaltation,
O He, Who is exalted despite His nearness.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
83 TO CURE BACK-ACHE
O He, Who creates whatever He wishes,
O He, Who does whatever He wishes,
O He, Who guides whomever He wishes,
O He, Who leaves astray whomever He wishes,
O He, Who punishes whomever He wishes,
O He, Who forgives whomever He wishes,
O He, Who honors whomever He wishes,
O He, Who dishonors whomever He wishes,

arabic text: يَا مَن يُّصَوِّرُ فِي الأَرْحَامِ مَا يَشَاءُ
english translation text: O He, Who fashions in the womb as He wishes,

arabic text: يَا مَن يَّخْتَصُّ بِرَحْمَتِهِ مَن يَّشَاءُ
english translation text: O He, Who chooses for His mercy whoever He wishes.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
84 TO CURE PAIN IN THE RIBS

arabic text: يَا مَن لَّمْ يَتَّخِذْ صَاحِبَةً وَّلاوَلَداً
english translation text: O He, Who has neither wife nor child,

arabic text: يَّا مَن جَعَلَ لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدْراً
english translation text: O He, Who creates everything in a fixed measure,

arabic text: يَّا مَن لا يُشْرِكُ فِي حُكْمِهِ أَحَداً
english translation text: O He, Who has no partner in His rule,

arabic text: يَّا مَن جَعَلَ فِي السَّمَاءِ بُرُوجاً
english translation text: O He, Who made constellations in the heaven,
O He, Who made the earth a place of abode,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ خَلَقَ مِنَ الْمَاءِ بَشَراً
english translation text: O He, Who created man from water,

arabic text: يَّا مَن جَعَلَ لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ أَمَداً
english translation text: O He, Who fixed a period for everything,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عِلْماً
english translation text: O He, Whose knowledge encompasses everything,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ أَحْصَى كُلَّ شَيْءٍ عَدَداً
english translation text: O He, Who knows the number and quantity of everything.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
85 TO CURE PAIN IN THE WRIST
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O First, O Last,
O Manifest, O Hidden,
O Virtuous, O Right,
O He, O Unique,
O Independent, O Eternal

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
86 TO CURE SPLEEN AILMENTS
O Best recognized of all the recognized,
O Best of all to be worshipped,
O Greatest of those to whom thanks are due,
O Most remembered of all who are remembered,
O Most praiseworthy of all those who are praised,
O Eternal Existent who is sought,
O Highest of those who are praised,
O Greatest of the purposes which are striven for,
O Most liberal Giver who is requested,
O Noblest Friend who is known.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
87 TO CURE HEADACHE
O Friend of those who weep,
O Refuge of those who trust in Him,
O Guide of the misguided,
O Master of the faithful,
O Friend of worshippers,
O Shelter of the sorrowful,
O Redeemer of the truthful,
O Mightiest of all,
O the most Knowledgeable of all beings.
O Allah of the entire Creation,

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
88 TO CURE PAIN IN FOREHEAD
O He, Who is high and dominant,
O He, Who is masterful and powerful,
O He, Who is hidden and aware,
O He, Who is worshipped and who appreciates,
O He, Who is disobeyed and yet forgives,
O He, Whom thought cannot encompass,
O He, Whom eyes cannot see,

arabic text: يَّا مَن لا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ أثَرٌ
english translation text: O He, from Whom nothing is concealed,
O Provider of Sustenance to mankind,
O He, Who ordained all destinies.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
89 TO CURE NON-STOP URINATION
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Protector, O Maker,
O Creator, O All-generous,
O Revealer, O Victorious,
O Disclosers, O Guarantor,
O Commander, O Prohibiter.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
90 TO CURE PAIN IN NAVEL

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يَعْلَمُ الْغَيْبَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
english translation text: O He, besides Whom no one knows the secrets,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يَصْرِفُ السُّوءَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
english translation text: O He, besides Whom no one drives away calamities,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يَخْلُقُ الْخَلْقَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
english translation text: O He, besides Whom no one creates,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يَغْفِرُ الذَّنْبَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
english translation text: O He, besides Whom no one forgives sins,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُتِمُّ النِّعْمَةَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
english translation text: O He, besides Whom no one perfects the bounties,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُقَلِّبُ الْقُلُوبَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
english translation text: O He, besides Whom no one transforms hearts,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُدَبِّرُ الأَمْرَ إِلاَّ هُو
english translation text: O He, besides Whom no one manages affairs,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُنَزِّلُ الْغَيْثَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
english translation text: O He, besides Whom no one holds the reins,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يَبْسُطُ الرِّزْقَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
english translation text: O He, besides Whom no one increases sustenance,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يُحْيِي الْمَوْتَى إِلاَّ هُوَ
english translation text: O He, besides Whom no one revives the dead.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
91 TO REMOVE THE STONE FROM BLADDER
O Helper of the weak,
O Companion of the strangers,
O Helper of [His] friends,
O Overpowerer of the enemies,
O Elevator of the sky,
O Genial to the chosen ones,
O Friend of the pious,
O Treasure of the indigent,
O Lord of the rich,
O Most benign of all.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
92 TO CURE PILES
O He Who is self-sufficient from everything,
O He Who is established over everything,
O He, nothing is like unto Him,

arabic text: يَّا مَن لا يَزِيدُ فِي مُلْكِهِ شَيْءٌ
english translation text: O He, nothing extends His Kingdom,

arabic text: يَّا مَن لا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ شَيْءٌ
english translation text: O He from Whom nothing is hidden,

arabic text: يَّا مَن لا يَنقُصُ مِنْ خَزَائِنِهِ شَيْءٌ
english translation text: O He, nothing decreases His treasure,
O He, nothing is like unto Him,

arabic text: يَّا مَن لا يَعْزُبُ عَنْ عِلْمِهِ شَيْءٌ
english translation text: O He, Whose Knowledge encompasses everything,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ خَبِيرٌ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: O He, Who is All-Aware,

arabic text: يَّا مَن وَّسِعَتْ رَحْمَتُهُ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ
english translation text: O He, Whose mercy extends to everything.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
93 TO CURE ULCERS
O Allah, verily I beseech You in Your name:
O Generous, O Provider,

O Bestower of bounties,
O Bestower of gifts,
O Enricher, O Giver of Shelter
O Destroyer, O Quickener,
O Satisfier, O Who grants salvation,

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
94 TO CURE NOSE AILMENTS
O First and the Last,
O Lord of everything and its Master,
O Lord Cherisher of everything and its Fashioner
O Creator of everything and its Maker,
O Controller of everything and its Extender,
O Origin of everything and its Return,
O Originator of everything and its Estimator,
O Creator of everything and its Destroyer,
O Quickener of everything and Maker of its death,
O Author of everything and its Inheritor.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
95 TO CURE STOMACH-ACHE
O Best Rememberer and Remembered,
O Best Appreciator and Appreciated,
O Best Praiser and Praised,
O Best Witness and Witnessed,
O Best Inviter and Invited,
O Best Responder and Responded,
O Best Comforter and Counselor,
O Best Friend and Companion,
O Most Desired and Sought,
O Most Affectionate and Loved.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
96 TO CURE KNEE PAIN

arabic text: يَا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَن دَعَاهُ مُجِيبٌ
english translation text: O Allah, the Answerer to him who calls Him,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَنْ أَطَاعَهُ حَبِيبٌ
english translation text: O Friend of him who obeys Him,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ إِلَى مَنْ أَحَبَّهُ قَرِيبٌ
english translation text: O He, Who is close to him who loves Him,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ اسْتَحْفَظَهُ رَقِيبٌ
english translation text: O Protector of one who seeks protection,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَن رَّجَاهُ كَرِيمٌ
english translation text: O Allah Who is Generous to him who is hopeful of Him,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ عَصَاهُ حَلِيمٌ
english translation text: O Allah, Who is Forbearing to one who disobeys Him,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَظَمَتِهِ رَحِيمٌ
english translation text: O Allah, Who is Merciful in spite of His Grandeur,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي حِكْمَتِهِ عَظِيمٌ
english translation text: O Allah, Who is Great in His Wisdom,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ فِي إِحْسَانِهِ قَدِيمٌ
english translation text: O Allah, Who is Eternal in His Benevolence,

arabic text: يَّا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ أَرَادَهُ عَلِيمٌ
english translation text: O Allah, Who is Aware of one who seeks Him.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
97 TO CURE THROAT PAIN
O Allah, verily I entreat You in Your name:

O Primal Cause,
O Creator of desire,

arabic text: يَا مُقَلِّبُ يَا مُعَقِّبُ يَا مُرَتِّبُ
english translation text:
O Changer, O Inflictor,
O Organiser,

arabic text: يَا مُخَوِّفُ يَا مُحَذِّرُ يَا مُذَكِّرُ
english translation text: O Awful, O Saver, O Reminder,
O Subjector, O Displacer.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
98 TO SEEK FUFILMENT OF LEGITIMATE DESIRES
O He Whose Knowledge is eternal,
O He Whose Promise is true,
O He Whose Benignity is manifest,
O He Whose Command is overruling,
O He Whose Book is clear and final,
O He Whose Judgement is inevitable,
O He Whose Qur'an is glorious,
O He Whose Rule is eternal,
O He Whose Favour is common to all,
O He Whose Throne is great.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
99 TO CURE PAIN IN LEGS

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يَشْغَلُهُ سَمْعٌ عَن سَمْعٍ
english translation text: O He - listening to one individual does not prevent Him from listening to others simultaneously,

arabic text: يَّا مَن لا يَمْنَعُهُ فِعْلٌ عَن فِعْلٍ
english translation text: O He - doing one thing does not prevent Him from doing other things simultaneously,

arabic text: يَّا مَن لا يُلْهِيهِ قَوْلٌ عَن قَوْلٍ
english translation text: O He - the speech of one person does not make Him needless of the simultaneous speech of others,

arabic text: يَّا مَن لا يُغَلِّطُهُ سُؤَالٌ عَن سُؤَالٍ
english translation text: O He - one request does not make Him forgetful of other requests,

arabic text: يَّا مَن لا يَحْجُبُهُ شَيْءٌ عَن شَيْءٍ
english translation text: O He - the sight of one thing does not prevent Him from seeing other things simultaneously,

arabic text: يَّا مَن لا يُبْرِمُهُ إِلْحَاحُ الْمُلِحِّينَ
english translation text: O He - the plaintive cries of those who weep and lament do not bother Him,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ هُوَ غَايَةُ مُرَادِ الْمُرِيدِينَ
english translation text: O He Who is the ultimate Aim of the efforts of saints,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُنتَهَى هِمَمِ الْعَارِفِينَ
english translation text: O He Who is the Goal of gnostics,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُنتَهَى طَلَبِ الطَّاِلبِينَ
english translation text: O He Who is the Goal of seekers,

arabic text: يَا مَن لا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ ذَرَّةً فِي الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text: O He from Whom not a single particle in the worlds is hidden.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text:
Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord
100 TO CURE THIGH PAIN
O Forbearing Who does not make haste,
O Generous Who is never a miser,
O True Who never breaks the promise
O Munificent Who never regrets,
O Dominant Who is never overpowered,
O Great Who is indescribable
O Just Who is never oppressive,
O Bounteous Who is never rapacious,
O Great Who does not become small,
O Protector Who does not neglect.

arabic text: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ, الْغَوْثَ الْغَوْثَ, خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ يَا رَبِّ
english translation text: Praise be to You, there is no god but You, I beseech You for relief, relief, Protect us from the Fire, O Lord

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
HAJAAT

Dua taught by
Imam Mahdi A.S.

In the Name of Allah,
the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
O Allah, (please do) grant us success to obey (You),
remoteness from disobedience (to You),
true intention,
and identification of sanctity.
(Please do) honor us with true guidance and straightforwardness,
dedicate our tongues to truth and wisdom,
fill our hearts with knowledge and learning,
purify our stomachs from illegally and suspiciously gotten food,
withhold our hands from oppression and larceny,
turn our sights away from licentiousness and treachery,
and block our hearings against vainness and backbiting,
confer upon our scholars with asceticism and advice,
upon the learners with hard work and desire (to learning),
upon the listeners with following and learning (lessons),
upon the Muslim patients with cure and comfort,
upon the dead Muslims with kindness and mercy,
upon our aged people with somberness and gentleness,
upon the youths with turning (to You) and repentance,
upon the women with shyness and chastity,
upon the rich with modesty and ample giving,
upon the poor with patience and satisfaction,
upon the warriors with triumph and supremacy,
upon the prisoners with release and comfort,
upon the rulers with justice and sympathy,
and upon the subjects with impartiality and good behavior.

arabic text: وَبَارِكْ لِلْحُجَّاجِ وَالزُّوَّارِ فِي ٱلزَّادِ وَٱلنَّفَقَةِ
english translation text: (Please do) bless the pilgrims to Mecca and the visitors (of the tombs of the saints) with provision and expenditure,

arabic text: وَٱقْضِ مَا أَوْجَبْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ مِنَ ٱلْحَجِّ وَٱلْعُمْرَةِ
english translation text: and help them settle the Hajj and `Umrah that You have made incumbent upon them,
in the name of Your grace and mercy, O most merciful of all those who show mercy!

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
